_readme: Registry for the HyperFrames engine. Update only through the process in engine/hyperframes/README.md -- never hand-edit files under engine/hyperframes/src/ or bin/ as a side effect of rendering a job; changes to the engine go through this file's version bump.
source: built in-repo at engine/hyperframes/ (first-party, not an external drop-in)

runtime_dependencies.playwright: ^1.56.1 (drives headless Chromium for HTML frame rendering)
runtime_dependencies.ffmpeg: must be on PATH -- not bundled; used for all encode/composite steps
